commit_message:
Make simulations work on Vivado xsim. Tested on Vivado 2017.1 Make simulations work on Vivado xsim. Tested on Vivado 2017.1 Created a new directory sim_vivado in order not to mess up with the existing VCS environment.
TB files and RTL needed some ifdefs to be compatible with Vivado XSIM.
- $value$plugargs compatibility
- $sformatf not supported by Vivado

TODO:
- about 100+ RTL files in VLIB requires more ifdefs for $value$plusargs. This seems to not affect basic simulations. I will work o
